titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Office of International Affairs, Yale University, Records
Office of International Affairs, Yale University, Records
titlestmt.author: compiled by Michael Lotstein

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Saturday May 23, 2026 at 03:00

did.unittitle: Office of International Affairs, Yale University, records
did.abstract: The records in this collection documents the activities of the Office of International Relations at Yale University. They include international program records, leadership programs, meeting records and correspondence.

odd.head: General
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 4-E (YRG 4-E), Records documenting international students and scholars at Yale.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: This collection is restricted. See Collection Contents for details.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records in this collection documents the activities of the Office of International Relations at Yale University. They include international program records, leadership programs, meeting records and correspondence.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Office of International Affairs, Yale University, Records (RU 1197). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.
